channel.title: Claude Code on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Claude Code on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Announcing: GitHub Copilot and Claude Code connectors in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description:
Microsoft Agent Framework now includes generally available connectors for GitHub Copilot and Claude Code. These connectors let .NET and Python agents delegate coding tasks to either system without custom adapter code.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: security: Securing CI/CD in an agentic world: Claude Code Github action case
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence reported a prompt injection path in Claude Code GitHub Action that could expose workflow secrets under specific conditions. The post describes the attack chain, disclosure, Anthropic’s mitigation, and recommendations for securing AI-assisted CI/CD workflows.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: devops+ai: 🔥Sending Email from Claude Code with Zero Dependencies🔥
item.description:
The article describes sending email from Claude Code using only shell tools, specifically curl and awk, with no extra dependencies. It frames the approach as a lightweight, command-line workflow for composing and sending email from the terminal.

  • Source: Let’s do DevOps
